victim.value: Cherry - woman with bruises and distress, fleeing from a pursuer
victim.quote: steadying her and peering at the smudged mascara under eyes still puffy from crying

closed_world.value: Host club where men aren't welcome - bounded social space
closed_world.quote: Men weren't welcome at host clubs; if her pursuer had managed to follow her, he wouldn't make it past

red_herring.value: Cherry's pursuer being positioned as potential threat while real danger may lie elsewhere in host club dynamics
red_herring.quote: if her pursuer had managed to follow her, he wouldn't make it past Taiyo

clue_fairness.value: Physical evidence clearly presented: bruises on arms, broken nail, limping, smudged makeup from crying
clue_fairness.quote: hastily covered the bruises on her arms with her wrap

social_world.value: Host club hierarchy with paid emotional labor - hosts earning more than salarymen, customers paying for validation
social_world.quote: handsome and charming they could make as much in a month as a salaryman earned in a year

investigator_wound.value: Cherry's emotional vulnerability and dependence on paid companionship to escape her troubles
investigator_wound.quote: When everything became too hard, too complicated, she could always count on him to treat her like a princess

_meta.title: ebook jonelle patrick fallen angel an only in tokyo mystery
